cleavage agent: trypsin was added for a >16 h incubation
collision energy: with a normalized collision energy (NCE) of 35%
fragmentation method: sequentially fragmented by higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD)
instrument: connected to a quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid Mass Spectrometry
reduction reagent: denatured with urea and reduced with DTT
